texto: Hundreds of thousands of people live in my library. Some are real, others are fictional. The real ones are the so-called imaginary characters in works of literature, the fictional ones are their authors. We know everything about the former, or at least as much as we are meant to know, everything that is written about a given character in a novel, a story or a poem in which she or he figures...The rest doesn't matter. Nothing is hidden from us. For us, a novel's characters are real. (p. 80
explicacao: Citação de Jacques Bonnet sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Hundreds of thousands of people live in my library. Some are real, others are fictional. The real…” articula trabalho, books, characters em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e characters.
